use_cases: User session navigation with avatar display in application sidebars
Dashboard navigation panels for SaaS applications
Authenticated user context menus and profile sections
ai_summary: A navigation sidebar component with integrated user avatar display, built using Radix UI primitives. Features a SessionNavBar implementation with Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback sub-components for handling user profile display with graceful fallbacks for missing images. Designed for authenticated app experiences requiring user context in navigation.
